name: Tofu Whipped Cream
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces fresh soft tofu (do NOT use - pressed, flavored, Japanese varieties, or previously frozen)
4 tablespoons maple syrup (up to 6 tablespoons) or fruit concentrate
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the tofu in cold water and press between several layers of paper towels or clean cloth to squeeze out all excess water.
2. Break the tofu into small pieces or mash it, then add it to a blender or food processor.
3. Add the remaining ingredients and blend until smooth.
4. Taste and adjust flavoring if desired, then blend again as necessary.
5. Optionally, add 1 tablespoon arrowroot powder (up to 3 tablespoons) or tapioca flour, or ½ teaspoon guar gum or xanthan gum for additional thickening.
6. Stir in up to 2 dashes of cinnamon.
7. Chill before serving.
Use this tofu whipped cream as a substitute for whipping cream on pies and other desserts.
